name: python3-playwright
title: python3-playwright
summary: Python library to automate Chromium, Firefox and WebKit browsers
description:
Python library to automate Chromium, Firefox and WebKit browsers
Playwright is a Python library to automate Chromium, Firefox and WebKit
browsers with a single API. Playwright delivers automation that is ever-
green, capable, reliable and fast.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-playwright because Python library to automate Chromium, Firefox and WebKit browsers.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-playwright as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-playwright with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-playwright --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
